title: Why this chronicle matters now
summary: The point of this chronicle is not to document past achievements, but to show how Kehan Dong's integrated approach to early founders, education, and long-term agency becomes increasingly relevant as more people seek unconventional paths to meaningful work.

signals.label: Integrated systems approach
signals.text: Kehan Dong operates across three interconnected domains: angel investing in early-stage founders, educational program development, and organizational founding. This integration creates a comprehensive support system for unconventional paths.

signals.label: Educational excellence at Duke Kunshan
signals.text: The 90.4/100 student rating at Startup Go Camp demonstrates the effectiveness of his teaching methodology, which combines business cases with personal experience and emphasizes high-quality student interaction through Office Hours.

signals.label: Inner Journey's transformational impact
signals.text: With 1000+ lives transformed over 25+ years, Inner Journey represents a proven approach to helping founders and leaders align inner development with outer achievement, addressing the cost of scaling without inner alignment.

signals.label: Focus on early discovery
signals.text: The central question driving all work: How do people discover what they're capable of early, and what environments make that possible? This inquiry shapes investment decisions, educational programs, and organizational development.

nextMoves.label: Continued SGC development
nextMoves.text: Building on the success of the first Startup Go Camp cohort, with potential for expansion and deeper integration with Duke Kunshan University's entrepreneurship ecosystem.

nextMoves.label: Scaling Inner Journey
nextMoves.text: Expanding the reach of Inner Journey's transformational work with founders and leaders globally.

nextMoves.label: Angel investment portfolio
nextMoves.text: Continuing to invest in early-stage founders who embody unconventional paths and long-term agency.
